summary: CRE Convert Deal, PDF Download, and Workflow Testing Complete - All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All three requested features verified working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - PDF Download button visible and functional, CRE Board working

seed_data_creation: Created test lead 'lead_31f19856baf4' (Test Convert Deal Client) for convert deal testing. Converted to project 'proj_f59bc806995b' (Test Project from Deal).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working: 1) PDF download using autoTable(doc, {...}) format works correctly - toast shows 'Rough Estimate PDF downloaded successfully!'. 2) Convert Deal handles null handover_months by defaulting to 12 months.

pdf_download.details: PDF Download button visible on Rough Estimate tab in ProjectDetail.jsx. Clicking triggers PDF generation using jspdf-autotable. Toast message 'Rough Estimate PDF downloaded successfully!' confirms fix for 'doc.autoTable is not a function' error.
pdf_download.test_project: proj_964bdc8c1e73 (RE - Mr.Vinoth) with RE project re_49663aa950ba

cre_convert_deal.details: POST /api/cre/convert-deal/{lead_id} endpoint works correctly. Tested with lead_31f19856baf4 - successfully converted to project proj_f59bc806995b. Fix for NoneType * int error verified - endpoint handles null handover_months by defaulting to 12 months.

cre_workflow.details: Full workflow tested: pending_payment → payment_received → in_planning
steps_verified: Step 1: CRE converts deal - Project created with status 'pending_payment'
Step 3: CRE sends to planning (PATCH /api/cre/projects/{id}/send-to-planning) - Status becomes 'in_planning'

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cre/new-deals: PASS - Returns closed deals from Sales
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/cre/convert-deal/{lead_id}: PASS - Converts deal to project with advance collection
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/projects/{id}/full-details: PASS - Returns project with RE reference
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/crm/re-projects/{id}: PASS - Returns RE project with scope items

project_detail_page.re_project_info: PASS - Shows RE Project Name, Location, Area, Building Type, Estimated Total, Handover Timeline, Status
project_detail_page.toast_on_download: PASS - Shows 'Rough Estimate PDF downloaded successfully!'

cre_board.new_deals_tab: PASS - Shows closed deals from Sales
cre_board.pending_payment_metric: PASS - Shows count of pending payment projects
cre_board.workflow_banner: PASS - Shows Draft → Submit for Payment → Accountant Verifies → Payment Received → Send to Planning

pdf_autotable_error.fix_applied: Changed import to 'import autoTable from jspdf-autotable' and using autoTable(doc, {...}) instead of doc.autoTable({...})
pdf_autotable_error.verification: PASS - PDF download works, success toast displayed

convert_deal_nonetype_error.original_error: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for *: NoneType and int
convert_deal_nonetype_error.fix_applied: Added null check for handover_months: (re_project.get('handover_months') if re_project else None) or 12
convert_deal_nonetype_error.verification: PASS - Convert deal works for leads without RE project (handover_months defaults to 12)
